## Comprehensive Data Analysis Report

### 1. Weather Analysis
Based on the data collected, Beijing is currently sunny at 28°C with 35% humidity and Shanghai is cloudy at 32°C with 70% humidity. The 10-day temperature trend generated by the code interpreter shows Beijing averaging 28.5°C with a standard deviation of 1.6°C, while Shanghai averages 32.2°C with a standard deviation of 1.3°C.

### 2. Historical Comparison
SQL query results indicate both cities are experiencing above-average temperatures for May 2025. The data pipeline processed 15,234 records with zero errors and is running healthy.

### 3. Visual Output
A temperature comparison chart has been generated. The revenue chart and user growth chart from the PDF report have been analyzed.

| City      | Current Temp | Humidity | 10-Day Avg | Trend     |
|-----------|-------------|----------|------------|------------|
| Beijing   | 28°C        | 35%      | 28.5°C     | Stable     |
| Shanghai  | 32°C        | 70%      | 32.2°C     | Rising     |

### 4. Citations
- Beijing Weather Report May 2025 (weather.gov)
- Q3 2025 Analytics Report
- Temperature comparison chart

content.text:
## Comprehensive Data Analysis Report

### 1. Weather Analysis
Based on the data collected, Beijing is currently sunny at 28°C with 35% humidity and Shanghai is cloudy at 32°C with 70% humidity. The 10-day temperature trend generated by the code interpreter shows Beijing averaging 28.5°C with a standard deviation of 1.6°C, while Shanghai averages 32.2°C with a standard deviation of 1.3°C.

### 2. Historical Comparison
SQL query results indicate both cities are experiencing above-average temperatures for May 2025. The data pipeline processed 15,234 records with zero errors and is running healthy.

### 3. Visual Output
A temperature comparison chart has been generated. The revenue chart and user growth chart from the PDF report have been analyzed.

| City      | Current Temp | Humidity | 10-Day Avg | Trend     |
|-----------|-------------|----------|------------|------------|
| Beijing   | 28°C        | 35%      | 28.5°C     | Stable     |
| Shanghai  | 32°C        | 70%      | 32.2°C     | Rising     |
